title: Bird flu: licence to move poultry by-products and hatching eggs for disposal from a protection or surveillance zone (EXD389(HPAI)(EW))
body: "Use this general licence to move hatching eggs and poultry by-products, including liquid egg products and egg shells, for disposal from a protection or surveillance zone to other premises within or outside the zone.  The licence can only be used within England and Wales. "
